name: @kolm/itkv-worker
description: W722 - isolated kolm Importance-Tiered KV Cache (ITKV) tier selector worker. Thin Node shell that spawns a Python tier-classifier (verbatim port of src/itkv-profile.js classifyToken). NO heavy deps - root kolm install stays light. Runtime KV cache tier DISPATCH (vLLM PagedAttention / SGLang radix cache) is a future wave; this worker only ships the classifier so an external runtime can call it as a sidecar.

python.note: Default tier selector is python3 workers/itkv/scripts/itkv.py. Uses ONLY the Python stdlib (argparse + json + sys); no heavy ML deps. Override via $ITKV_TIER_CMD (single command or JSON array form, e.g. ITKV_TIER_CMD='["node","stub.js"]').
